settings.title: 平台设置
settings.description: 应用名称、时区和默认语言。

staff.subtitle: 管理审核员、客服与支持 — 角色与权限。
staff.roleAssigned: 已分配角色 — 需重新登录。
staff.name: 姓名
staff.permissionMatrixHint: 根据您的权限勾选能力。
staff.confirmDeleteRole: 删除此角色？不得分配给任何用户。

users.subtitle: 客户账户 — 搜索、封禁与活动。

drivers.subtitle: KYC 队列与注册司机。
drivers.defaultRejectReason: 证件无效 — 请重新上传。

permissions.title: App permissions
permissions.subtitle: Ryvo-Line works best with these permissions. You can enable each one individually.
permissions.adminSubtitle: Enable the permissions below so staff can use maps, notifications, and document review.

location.title: Location while using the app
location.description: Show your position on the map, find nearby rides, and navigate trips.
location.adminDescription: Show fleet activity and the live operations map while the admin app is open.

locationAlways.title: Background location
locationAlways.description: Keep trip tracking alive when the app is in the background — riders see their driver approaching, drivers stay online for incoming requests, and pickup locations stay accurate.

sms.title: SMS
sms.description: Verify your phone number with one-time codes sent by SMS.
sms.adminDescription: Verify staff phone numbers with one-time codes sent by SMS.

camera.title: Camera
camera.description: Take photos of your ID, license, and vehicle documents for verification.
camera.adminDescription: Capture verification photos when reviewing driver KYC submissions.

photos.title: Photos
photos.description: Upload existing documents and profile images from your library.
photos.adminDescription: Open uploaded KYC files and support attachments from device storage.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Get ride requests, live trip status on a persistent notification, and important account alerts.
notifications.adminDescription: Receive operations alerts, support tickets, and trip escalations.

notificationPolicy.title: Do Not Disturb access
notificationPolicy.description: Show urgent trip and ride-request alerts even when Do Not Disturb is enabled.

exactAlarm.title: Exact alarms
exactAlarm.description: Schedule precise pickup reminders and trip countdown alerts.

activity.title: Physical activity
activity.description: Detect driving activity to improve location accuracy while you are online.

battery.title: Battery optimization
battery.description: Reduce interruptions to location sharing while you are online as a driver.

install.title: Install app updates
install.description: Install newer Ryvo-Line builds downloaded from GitHub OTA releases.
install.adminDescription: Install newer Ryvo-Line Admin builds downloaded from GitHub OTA releases.
